title: Vector Indexing Algorithms (HNSW & IVFFlat)
description: Master the principles of high-scale vector database indexing using algorithms like HNSW and IVFFlat. Analyze the trade-offs between search latency, memory usage, and recall accuracy for various vector indexing algorithms.
objectives: Master the principles of high-scale vector database indexing using algorithms like HNSW and IVFFlat.
Analyze the trade-offs between search latency, memory usage, and recall accuracy for various vector indexing algorithms.
